semantic.role: Factory function for creating a default SpineConfig object, providing baseline configuration values for the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Define and export the default configuration values for the ArchSpine system.
Initialize the config object with a specific schema version, project metadata, LLM settings, MCP context mode, and other baseline settings.
Integrate the default scan policy from the core module into the default config.
outOfScope: Specific default values (implementation details, subject to change).
Reading or writing configuration from external sources (files, env vars).
invariants: The default config must always have a schemaVersion equal to CURRENT_CONFIG_SCHEMA_VERSION.
The returned object must conform to the SpineConfig interface as defined in types.js.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a single, canonical factory for creating a default SpineConfig, ensuring consistency and centralizing initial configuration values.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial commit — this file is part of the first layout of the config subsystem.

publicSurface.description: Creates and returns a default SpineConfig object pre-populated with sensible defaults for project, LLM, MCP, and other settings. Consumed by the system bootstrapping process to establish initial configuration.

English.role: Factory function for creating a default SpineConfig object.
responsibilities: Export the single function `createDefaultConfig` that produces a baseline configuration for the ArchSpine system.
Initialize the config with a versioned schema identifier, project metadata, empty LLM settings, and an MCP context mode defaulting to off.
Incorporate the default scan policy from the core scan-policy module into the config defaults.
outOfScope: Reading config from external storage or environment variables.
Tracking changes to config values at runtime.
